WorkItem.title: WorkItem
WorkItem.description: Represents a work item in the workflow management system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkItem entity.

createdDate.description: Date when the work item was created.

inboundMethod.description: Method by which the work item was received.

subject.description: Subject or title of the work item.

assignedUserId.description: Reference to User assigned to the work item. (Relationship: User 1:N WorkItem)

customerId.description: Reference to the unique Customer ID.

description.description: Detailed description of the work item from the form's overview.

leadType.description: The source of the lead (e.g. Self Sources, Referral).

customerPhone.description: Primary phone number of the customer.

secondaryPhone.description: Secondary phone number of the customer.

pinCode.description: Pin code of the customer's address.

hasBusiness.description: Whether the customer has a business.

lockedBy.description: The ID of the user who has locked the work item for editing.

customerDateOfBirth.description: Date of birth of the customer.

customerIfscCode.description: IFSC code of the customer's bank branch.

customerOtherInfo.description: Any other miscellaneous information about the customer.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, matches Firebase Auth UID.

employeeId.description: Auto-generated unique sequential identifier for the employee (e.g., 1568400).

role.description: Role of the user (e.g., admin, user).

company.description: The company the user works for.

department.description: The department the user belongs to.

level.description: The user's level or grade in the organization.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer in the system.

id.description: Unique 10-digit alphanumeric identifier for the Customer entity.

phone.description: Primary phone number of the customer.

secondaryPhone.description: Secondary phone number of the customer.

pinCode.description: Pin code of the customer's address.

createdDate.description: Date when the customer was created.

SLA.title: SLA
SLA.description: Represents a Service Level Agreement for work items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SLA entity.

targetResolutionTime.description: Target date and time for work item resolution.

breached.description: Indicates whether the SLA has been breached.

Note.title: Note
Note.description: Represents a note associated with a work item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Note entity.

authorId.description: Reference to User who created the note.

GlobalNote.title: GlobalNote
GlobalNote.description: Represents a global note associated with a customer, not necessarily a specific work item.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer this note is about.

workItemId.description: Optional reference to a related WorkItem.

authorId.description: Reference to the User who created the note.

date.description: The date the note was created.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction associated with a work item.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer this transaction is for.

workItemId.description: Reference to the WorkItem this transaction is about.

createdById.description: Reference to the User who created the transaction.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Represents an audit log entry for actions performed in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entity.

userId.description: Reference to User who performed the action. (Relationship: User 1:N AuditLog)

workItemId.description: Reference to WorkItem associated with the action. (Relationship: WorkItem 1:N AuditLog)

actionType.description: Type of action performed (e.g., status change, assignment).

timestamp.description: Date and time when the action was performed.

Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a document (like an image) uploaded to the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

workItemId.description: Reference to WorkItem the document is associated with.

url.description: Data URL of the uploaded document/image.

uploadedAt.description: Date and time when the document was uploaded.

uploadedById.description: Reference to User who uploaded the document.

type.description: The type of the document (e.g., EMAIL, CORR, QUOTE).

direction.description: The direction of the communication (e.g., INBOUND, OUTBOUND).

documentSource.description: The source of the document (e.g., PRPC, XEROX).

businessEvent.description: The business event related to the document (e.g., DOCGEN, QUOTE).

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task associated with a work item.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

createdBy.description: Reference to User who created the task.

Counter.title: Counter
Counter.description: A distributed counter for generating sequential IDs.

value.description: The current value of the counter.

logoUrl.description: The data URL of the application logo.

externalApiKey.description: The secret API key for external integrations.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Includes a 'role' field for authorization.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique 10-digit alphanumeric identifier for the customer.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: slaId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SLA.

definition.description: Stores notes for a specific work item.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: noteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the note.

definition.description: Stores documents associated with work items.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the document.

definition.description: Stores tasks for a specific work item.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique identifier for the task.

definition.description: Stores audit logs for a specific work item.

params.name: workItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the work item.

params.name: auditLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for the audit log entry.

definition.description: Stores all financial transactions for all customers. Indexed by customerId.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

definition.description: Stores distributed counters for generating sequential IDs. For example, a document at /counters/work_items would store the counter for work items.
Stores global application settings. Expects a single document with a known ID like 'main'.

params.name: configId
params.description: The ID of the configuration document (e.g., 'main').

definition.description: Stores global notes that are associated with a customer but not necessarily a specific work item.

params.name: noteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the global note.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure has been simplified to a non-multi-tenant model. Collections like `users` and `work_items` are at the root level for straightforward access. Subcollections for `notes`, `documents`, and `audit_logs` are nested under their parent `work_items` to create clear data ownership and simplify queries and security rules. A new `app_config` collection is added to store global settings like the application logo. This flat hierarchy for primary records combined with nesting for child records is easier to query and maintain.
